name: scout-baseline
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>verify>handoff>audit | scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,perf-aware,deterministic-output | lens: goldratt-toc | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: MEASUREMENT_METHOD
required_inputs.description: How the baseline will be captured.

required_inputs.name: BUDGET_HINT
required_inputs.description: Known target budget or threshold if one already exists.
